Herein, we have carried out the reaction of various
substituted aromatic aldehyde/acid with N-methyl-o-
phenylenediamine hydrochloride/2-amino-phenol in the
presence of PPA at 145–150°C for 3–6 h by conventional
method obtaining products (BK-1–11) in very good to
excellent yields in shorter reaction time (Scheme 1) and
for plausible reaction mechanism (Schemes 2and 3).
